---
title: "Woo-Sung Hollenhorst"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/woo-sung-hollenhorst-b05386220/
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/woosunghollenhorst
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:woohollenhorst@gmail.com
---
<style>
body {
  background-image: url('images/background.jpg');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-attachment: fixed;
}
</style>
I'm a Business Analytics Master student at DCU Business School with a passion for data science, strategy, and technology. Welcome to my portfolio - explore my projects, learn about my background. If I caught your interest, feel free to reach out to me. Enjoy!
